caption: A screen recording captures a virtual meeting where a participant shares a digital conceptual map. The map consists of various circular icons connected by curved blue lines on a black background, featuring labels such as "Rural Community Fellows," "Large Corporate Farm," and "Health Clinic." The top of the browser window displays tabs including "Trust & Learning by Sync," "Movements by Systemini," and "Future of Society by Insight." In the upper right corner, a video feed shows a man with glasses and a dark shirt; in a separate feed, another man wearing a baseball cap is visible. Across the sequence, the man in the cap appears and disappears from the screen. The conceptual map remains static throughout the frames, while the participant's video feeds fluctuate, with the man in the baseball cap visible in the first and third frames but absent in the second and fourth.
